trans-unit.source: Some products (gift cards, license keys, software, weapons, ...) cannot be sold with Alma, as per [1]our terms[/1] (see Exclusions paragraph).
trans-unit.target: Some products (gift cards, license keys, software, weapons, ...) cannot be sold with Alma, as per [1]our terms[/1] (see Exclusions paragraph).

trans-unit.source: If you are selling such products on your shop, you need to configure Alma so that it is not enabled when customers view or shop them.
trans-unit.target: If you are selling such products on your shop, you need to configure Alma so that it is not enabled when customers view or shop them.

trans-unit.source: Use the [1][2]category exclusions page[/2][/1] to comply with these restrictions.
trans-unit.target: Use the [1][2]category exclusions page[/2][/1] to comply with these restrictions.
